title: senecio invalidus
intro: Senecio invalidus, also known as Groundsel Bush or Narrow-leaved Ragwort, is a perennial plant species native to Australia. Its medicinal properties are derived from its leaves and flowers, which contain sesquiterpene lactones that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used for its health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. Senecio invalidus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although proper dosing and caution are recommended due to potential toxicity.
